products.name: XPress Plus Premium Post Fence
products.description: Friction-fit post system — slats insert directly into patented XPL posts (no side frames, no CFC). End posts are 1W, inline posts are 2W, corner posts are 90°.

product_components.name: XPL Spacer Block 5mm — 50 Pack
product_components.description: UV stabilised ASA black 5mm spacer block, 50-pack

product_components.name: XPL Spacer Block 9mm — 50 Pack
product_components.description: UV stabilised ASA black 9mm spacer block, 50-pack

product_components.name: XPL Spacer Block 20mm — 50 Pack
product_components.description: UV stabilised ASA black 20mm spacer block, 50-pack (actual spacer 21mm)

product_components.name: XPL Slat Locking Clip — 10 Pack
product_components.description: Powder coated aluminium slat locking clip, 10-pack incl. SS304 screws. Fixes top slat only.

product_components.name: XPL Block — 5 Pack
product_components.description: 100mm long UV stabilised ASA block, 5-pack. Starting height spacer — can be cut to size.

product_components.name: XPL Side Frame 6000mm — Black Satin
product_components.description: XPL friction-fit side frame, 6000mm stock (used in BAYG side frame variant)
